DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-26-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
CROSS-DEFENDANT DMITRI GRIBANOWSKI'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINANT'S CROSS-COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Vladimir Privalov, 370-8725 x-complainant & opposing party in propria persona; no other appearances.

RULING: Discussed and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED.
